verdict: PARTIAL — coef=-1.327, p=0.331 (above α=0.10); direction inconclusive
falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is considered falsified if the pre-registered empirical test shows the opposite direction of the claim at conventional significance (p > 0.10), or if the primary outcome measure moves less than 10% in the claimed direction across the sample. Exact thresholds will be pinned in the variables and estimator blocks when this stub is promoted from draft.
falsification_test_text: Panel FE of life expectancy and life satisfaction on UBS indicator and material-footprint per capita, country and year FE 1970-2022; falsified if UBS coefficient on wellbeing not positive at p<0.10 conditional on lower throughput.

estimate.method: statsmodels OLS FE fallback (linearmodels failed: No module named 'linearmodels')
